mapper.select: SELECT *, CASE WHEN tc_cnt IS NOT NULL THEN 1000 ELSE NULL END AS tc_val, CASE WHEN tc_cnt IS NOT NULL THEN tc_name ELSE '' END AS tc_val_name, CASE WHEN w_lot IS NOT NULL THEN 1200 ELSE NULL END AS lot_val, CASE WHEN w_lot IS NOT NULL THEN w_lot ELSE '' END AS lot_name FROM ( SELECT regtime, hw_pv, qf1_pv, qf2_pv, qf3_pv, qf4_pv, qf5_pv, oil_cool_pv, oil_heat_pv, (cp_a_pv * 0.001) AS cp_a_pv, (cp_b_pv * 0.001) AS cp_b_pv, rw_pv, tf1_pv, tf2_pv, tf3_pv, tf4_pv, tf5_pv, cold_cool_pv, cold_heat_pv, hw_sp, qf1_sp, qf2_sp, qf3_sp, qf4_sp, qf5_sp, oil_cool_sp, oil_heat_sp, cp_a_sp, cp_b_sp, rw_sp, tf1_sp, tf2_sp, tf3_sp, tf4_sp, tf5_sp, cold_cool_sp, cold_heat_sp, qf_inv_pv, qt_inv_pv, cleaner1_inv_pv, cleaner2_inv_pv, tf_inv_pv, agi_inv_pv, qf_inv_sp, qt_inv_sp, cleaner1_inv_sp, cleaner2_inv_sp, tf_inv_sp, agi_inv_sp, 'AAA' AS zz FROM tb_temp WHERE regtime BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ) AS A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT *, 'AAA' AS zzz FROM tb_temp_change WHERE tc_regtime BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ) AS B ON LEFT(A.regtime,16) = LEFT(B.tc_regtime,16) LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT w_sdatetime, w_lot FROM tb_worklist WHERE regtime BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ) AS C ON LEFT(A.regtime,16) = LEFT(C.w_sdatetime,16) ORDER BY regtime
SELECT *, user_name AS tc_user_name FROM tb_temp_change A INNER JOIN tb_user B ON A.tc_user_code = B.user_code WHERE 1=1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_temp_change (tc_regtime, tc_name, tc_desc, tc_user_code) VALUES (#{tc_regtime}, #{tc_name}, #{tc_desc}, #{tc_user_code})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_temp_chage SET tc_desc = #{tc_desc}, tc_name = #{tc_name} WHERE tc_cnt = #{tc_cnt}
